description_long: This is a rectangular wooden desk with a natural light wood grain finish, featuring a flat and spacious tabletop suitable for writing or computer work. On the right side, there is a pedestal with two drawers, each equipped with a horizontal black handle, providing storage for office supplies or documents. The left side of the desk is supported by a solid vertical panel, while the right side is fully enclosed by the drawer unit. The back of the desk is plain, with no additional features or openings, and the left end panel has a slightly different, warmer wood tone. The overall design is minimalist and functional, with clean lines and a sturdy appearance. The desk is suitable for both professional and home office environments.
description: A light wood grain desk with two right-side drawers and a minimalist, sturdy design. The desk features a spacious flat top and clean lines, ideal for office or study use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full tabletop, right-side drawers with black handles, and left support panel.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the depth of the desk and the solid enclosure of the drawer unit.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back panel and the contrasting left end panel with a warmer wood tone.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the solid left support panel and the uninterrupted wood grain surface.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the one with the two drawers and handles on the right, with the open leg space on the left for seating; the back is plain and featureless.
